allow: Bash(python -c "from app.models.schemas import AIConfig, EpisodeConfig, ConvertRequest; print\('AIConfig:', AIConfig\(\).model_dump\(\)\); print\('EpisodeConfig:', EpisodeConfig\(\).model_dump\(\)\); print\('ConvertRequest:', ConvertRequest\(ai_config=AIConfig\(\), episode_config=EpisodeConfig\(\)\).model_dump\(\)\)")

Bash(timeout 4 python -c "import uvicorn; from app.main import app; print\('FastAPI app loaded successfully'\); print\('Routes:'\); [print\(f'  {r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\)]")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; from app.models.schemas import EpisodeSummary; print\('All imports OK'\); print\('EpisodeSummary fields:', list\(EpisodeSummary.model_fields.keys\(\)\)\)")
